title: PGIMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Technical Support I Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has released an official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Project Technical Support I Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the 10th Pass, Diploma, and ITI can use this chance and apply for the PGIMER Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list o...
